subcodes.first_line: We have come for the remembrance, and Our mention is a reminder unto the servants, guiding them towards the Remembered One, and when from the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما از برای ذکر آمده ایم و ذکر ما تذکر عباد است بسوی مذکور و چون از افق اعلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
